title: Classification of Digital Storage Elements
description: A hierarchical flowchart showing the different types of storage elements used in digital systems, categorized by their clocking methodology and functionality.
relationships: Latches are the fundamental building blocks
Flip-Flops are constructed from latches and provide synchronous operation
Registers are groups of flip-flops that store data words
Shift Registers are specialized registers that shift data
Counters are registers that sequence through a set of states
Memory Arrays are large collections of storage cells organized for dense data storage
